creator: scheidell@secnap.net
text:
last time I bother you today.

looks like v330.pre was on about 80% of the systems, and missing on the 
other 20%.

good catch, I don't know why it was on the 80%.

patch approved.



On 2/22/10 9:11 AM, Michael Scheidell wrote:
> wait before applying patch.. all of the systems I looked at have 
> v330.pre already installed.
